PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX psv: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel(MAX(xsd:decimal(?amount)) AS ?maxSalary) WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P106 wd:Q3665655 ; wdt:P54 / wdt:P118 wd:Q155223 .
  ?player p:P3618 / psv:P3618 ?amountNode .
  ?amountNode wikibase:quantityAmount ?amount ; wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q4917 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?maxSalary)
LIMIT 1
